Name: MASRAD
Provider: Arab Center for Research and Policy Studies
Doha Institute for Policy and Studies
Paper_Title: MASRAD: Arabic Terminology Management Corpora with Semi-Automatic Construction
Affiliations: Arab Center for Research and Policy Studies
Doha Institute for Policy and Studies
Abstract: This paper introduces MASRAD, a large dataset of parallel foreign-Arabic terms sourced from academic books, along with MASRAD-Ex, a semi-automatic construction framework. The dataset aids terminology management, translation consistency, and cross-lingual text processing in Arabic.
